candidates.why: Best top-line revenue label; preferred over the duplicate total row because it is the non-total component-equivalent line and values match Total Revenue.
Duplicate total revenue line with identical values; less preferred because it is a total row.
This is COGS/cost of revenue, not top-line revenue.

candidates.row_label: Sales from licensing revenues and royalties1
candidates.why: Appears to be a subcomponent/older specific revenue stream rather than the main total revenue line.

variables.notes: Use Revenues as primary; Total Revenue as fallback because labels may vary by year.

candidates.why: Direct cost line and preferred over the duplicate total cost-of-revenues line.
Balance sheet inventory component, not income statement expense.
Duplicate total cost-of-revenues line with identical values; less preferred than the more specific Cost of goods sold.

variables.notes: Selected the specific income statement COGS row, not the duplicate total.

candidates.why: Valid SG&A component; explicit selling/distribution overhead line.
Clear SG&A component and populated across years.
Best additional overhead bucket among candidates; exclude D&A/interest/taxes.
Balance sheet accrual detail, not an income statement operating expense row.

variables.notes: No single explicit populated SG&A total row is available. Selected the best overhead component rows and excluded generic totals/subtotals such as expenses and Operating (Income)/Expense, Net.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of capitalized R&D is not current-period R&D expense and should be excluded.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset gross amount, not expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not expense.
Liability/revenue-related balance sheet item, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: No valid income statement R&D expense line is present. Balance sheet R&D asset lines and amortization of capitalized R&D are not XRD.

candidates.why: Closest expense-only finance line, though broader than pure interest expense and may include non-interest items.
Acceptable fallback when pure interest expense is unavailable; net amount may include finance income.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Pure interest but only lease-related supplemental item, likely incomplete for total interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Changes in liabilites measured at fair value throught profit or loss

variables.notes: REVIEWED. Changed. No clear standalone total interest expense line exists. Using reported finance-cost labels as priority list across years, with singular/plural net finance labels first, then Financial expenses. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Net financial cost, [Income Statement] Net financial costs

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to parent companys owners
candidates.why: Best book equity line because it excludes non-controlling interests and is preferred over Total Equity.
Usable only if no owner/parent equity line exists; here it duplicates the preferred owner equity line.
Balancing row, not appropriate when an actual equity line exists.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total assets/liabilities+equity, not book equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to parent companys owners

variables.notes: Preferred parent-owner equity line to avoid double counting with MIB.
No minority interest/non-controlling interest line is present. Total Equity equals Equity attributable to parent companys owners, indicating no separate MIB.
